Anda dapat mengimpor data utilisasi alat: You can import heavy equipment utilization data from 3 supported vendor formats:
Data ekspor langsung dari sistem Caterpi: Direct export data from the Caterpillar Product Link system.
Template laporan internal dengan kolom s: Internal report template with standard operational columns.
Format data ekspor dari sistem Enterpris: Export data format from the SAP Enterprise Resource Planning system.
Pastikan format ekstensi file yang diung: Make sure the uploaded file extension is .xlsx or .xls, and the column headers match the heavy equipment data standard.
Persentase waktu di mana mesin menyala n: Percentage of time the engine is running but not doing operational activity. The lower the % idle, the more efficient the heavy equipment usage.
Rata-rata konsumsi bahan bakar alat bera: Average fuel consumption of heavy equipment per operational hour.
Jika rata-rata % idle aset melebihi 40%,: If the average % idle of an asset exceeds 40%, a warning panel will appear on the dashboard to indicate fuel wastage.
Grafik lingkaran yang menampilkan distri: Pie chart showing the distribution of total operating time load by work location/area.
Mengapa grafik harian saya kosong setela: Why is my daily graph blank after import?
Hal ini biasanya terjadi karena Anda mem: This usually happens because you filter a month or year that does not match the data in the Excel file. Please check the date column in the imported data, or let the default filter automatically load the latest month.
Bagaimana cara membatalkan import jika t: How to cancel an import if a data error occurs?
Buka halaman Import Data, lihat bagian \: Open the Import Data page, look at the "File Upload History" section, then click the "Delete Data" button on the row of the incorrect file name. The system will automatically delete the related data without affecting other files.
